历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 Physics/Science minimum rankings approximately 285→172→154→126, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 159 positions over the past 4 years, intensifying competition year by year; 2025 baseline approximately 126; local Physics enrollment plan: 2022: 9, 2023: 7, 2024: 3, 2025: 9; 2026 plan only 2, a significant reduction of about 77.8% compared to 2025, extreme scarcity of slots, markedly increased competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, C9 League member, one of the Seven Sons of National Defense; Soft Science main ranking 2026: 12th (Top 20), stable in the 11–16 range in recent years, extremely high school level; 2024 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed (once had abnormal admission score discussions but has been digested); 2026 reputation neutral/mixed (only rumor-related public opinion, no substantial negative impact); Douyin popularity total ranking 10th (high heat), short video exposure large, application attention continues to heat up; no obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded; Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A, Civil Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, etc., 17 A- and above disciplines, top engineering strength nationwide, extremely attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communications, Computer Science and other engineering majors have been highly recommended for many consecutive years, still at the forefront of popularity in 2026; local Physics candidates in 2026 approximately 44,500 (estimated based on recent proportion), basically flat with 2025, competition base unchanged; Harbin Institute of Technology located in Heilongjiang, not a local university, very small proportion of enrollment in Ningxia (2025 Ningxia enrollment 12, accounting for 0.02% of national total), cross-province application requires higher score and ranking support.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction of Physics enrollment plan to only 2 slots in 2026 (extreme scarcity), the university's top engineering strength and high Douyin attention, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with ranking shifting forward by about 9 positions from the 2025 baseline of 126; predicted minimum ranking approximately 117, range 67–167.
